message.content:
THE 5★ PATH • PUBLIC PROOF ENGINE  

Every 5★ Becomes Public Proof — End to End  

01  
G  
Redirect to Review  
Sent to your Google review link — or an internal form / private WhatsApp instead.  

02  
🤖  
AI Auto-Response  
Once posted, AI replies on-brand — tailored to your business and the words of their review.  

03  
📷  
Instagram Story  
Text reviews become a branded Story. Reviews with a photo are turned into a video Story automatically.  

04  
▶️  
Reel + LinkedIn  
Photo reviews post as an Instagram Reel — and to LinkedIn for B2B credibility.  

Got a photo with the review? It’s auto-converted into a video Story, published as a Reel, and posted to LinkedIn — no editing on your side.
